entries.name: Balanced Flux
entries.definition: You maintain equilibrium while allowing natural change.

entries.name: Dynamic Harmony
entries.definition: You create unity through active interplay of forces.

entries.name: Stable Center
entries.definition: You anchor firmly in unchanging principles.

entries.name: Transformative Edge
entries.definition: You operate at boundaries where change occurs.

entries.name: Integrative Flow
entries.definition: You merge different energies into coherent streams.

entries.name: Quantum State
entries.definition: You exist in multiple modes simultaneously.

entries.name: Unified Field
entries.definition: You harmonize all polarities in oneness.
